title: Nested Data Merging with Conditional Logic
scenario: Write a prompt that merges two datasets, one containing employee information and another containing project assignments, where each employee has a unique ID, name, and department, and each project has a unique ID, employee ID, and project name. The datasets contain the following information: 'Employee ID: 123, Name: John Doe, Department: Sales. Project ID: 1, Employee ID: 123, Project Name: Project A.' 'Employee ID: 456, Name: Jane Doe, Department: Marketing. Project ID: 2, Employee ID: 456, Project Name: Project B.' The prompt should generate a merged dataset containing employee information and project assignments, using conditional logic to filter projects by department.
constraints: Must use conditional logic to filter projects by department
Must merge the datasets using nested data structures
Must generate a merged dataset containing employee information and project assignments

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt uses conditional logic to filter projects by department and merges the datasets using nested data structures.
Verify that the generated merged dataset accurately represents the employee information and project assignments.
Check if the generated prompt is syntactically valid and can be executed without errors.
